FROM HIGH RESOLUTION TOTAL CROSS SECTION
.FE203 ENRICHED OXIDE POWDER CANNED IN AL TUBES
CONTAINING A 0.3 MM THICK WINDOW. SAMPLE
TIME OF FLIGHT WITH A PATH LENGTH OF
.AT PRESENT ONLY THE FE-56 CROSS SECTION DATA
HAVE BEEN ANALYSED TO OBTAIN RESONANCE PARAMETERS.
SHAPE ANALYSIS OF THE TOTAL CROSS SECTION
DATA USING THE REICH-MOORE MULTILEVEL CODE
.THE SPIN AND PARITY OF SUFFICIENTLY BROAD RESONANCES
WERE ASSIGNED IN THE FOLLOWING WAY-
1) S-WAVE RESONANCES WERE EASILY DETECTED BECAUSE
2) ASSIGNMENT OF L=1 OR L=2 CAN BE DONE ON THE
BASIS OF THE ASSYMETRY OF THE RESONANCE SHAPE.
3) SPIN ASSIGNMENT WAS BASED ON THE PEAK TOTAL
4) IN CERTAIN CASES L AND J ASSIGNMENT WAS
POSSIBLE ON THE BASIS OF OBSERVED
.THE CORRECTIONS INCORPORATED IN THE ANALYSIS CODE
'MULTI' ARE NOT SPECIFIED IN THE MAIN REFERENCE.
DOUBLET WITH MOMENTUM GREATER THAN ZERO.
.FOR P-WAVE AND D-WAVE RESONANCES THE SPIN AND
PARITY WAS ASSIGNED FOR 2/3 OF THE TOTAL
STRENGTH. THE DATA IN THIS SUBWORK WAS OBTAINED
BY INCREASING THE ASSIGNED STRENGTH FOR THE
P-WAVE AND D-WAVE RESONANCES BY 50 PER CENT.
.DATA TAKEN FROM TEXT OF MAIN REFERENCE.
